subject: FYI: New persona Archie (Chief Architect) — no MasterCalendar action needed
body:
Quinn — heads-up only, no action required from you.

Toby authorized creating a new persona, Archie, the Chief Architect (tech + process) for HDTS-wide scope. Files in place; Gotan has the registry-edit asks.

## Why no MasterCalendar action
- Archie is **NOT** going into `scripts/start-team.sh` — episodic launch only (like Gauge)
- Standalone launcher: `~/MyDocs/Archie/scripts/start-archie.sh`
- Hub port: 8814
- Scope is HDTS-wide, peer to Gotan — not a MasterCalendar-half persona

## When Archie might consult you
- If he flags a process gap in MasterCalendar coordination
- If his Anthropic-tech briefs recommend something for the MasterCalendar team
- If he proposes a new persona that would touch your start-team.sh — you'd be the integrator at that point

## What Archie won't do
- Override your MasterCalendar coordination
- Edit team code
- Drive day-to-day work

First spawn (TBD by Toby) will produce a baseline audit in `~/MyDocs/Archie/docs/`. I'll loop you on anything MasterCalendar-relevant from it.

— AIDI
